tableGroups.wordCorrectionHint:
WORD TABLE CORRECTIONS (TABLE_INDENT strategy):
  Root cause: Table.LeftIndent changed from -10.8pt to -5.4pt between versions.
  Fix: set Table.LeftIndent to -10.8pt (-216 twips).
  Apply ONCE per table — do NOT apply per word or per phrase.
  Note: table has negative indent (intentional margin positioning).

WORD TABLE CORRECTIONS (TABLE_INDENT_FALLBACK strategy):
  Uniform drift of -11.04pt across all 1 columns.
  Root cause unclear (cell padding and table indent do not match drift).
  Fix: reduce Table.LeftIndent by -11.04pt (-221 twips).
  This shifts the entire table left as a unit — do NOT apply per word or per phrase.
  Verify: Table.LeftIndent in source .docx = 16.6pt. New value should be 27.64pt.

correctionTargets.description: [CELL_PADDING] Reduce LeftPadding on ALL cells in table from 5.4pt → 0pt to cancel +5.4pt drift. Apply once to all rows/cells — NOT per word.
